name: Simply Delicious Black Forest Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Devil's food cake mix (18.25 oz)
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------TOPPING----------------------------------
1 cup frozen non-dairy whipped topping, thawed (8 oz)
21 ounces chilled cheery pie filling
Preheat oven to 350°F. Spray two 9-inch round cake pans with Baker's Joy.
In a large mixing bowl, combine all ingredients for the batter. Mix at low speed until blended, scraping the sides of the bowl for about one minute. Then mix at medium speed for three minutes until smooth.
Divide the batter evenly between the prepared cake pans. Bake in the preheated oven at 350°F for 30-33 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Allow to cool on wire racks for 15 minutes, then turn out onto cooling racks and allow to cool completely. To assemble, place one cake layer upside-down on a serving platter. Using a cake decorator tube or spoon, outline the edge of the cake with whipped topping. Fill the center with cherry pie filling and spread more whipped topping over it. Place the second cake layer on top. Outline the outer edge with remaining whipped topping and spread any remaining cherry filling in the center. Chill for at least one hour before serving. Leftovers should be covered and refrigerated.
